data.title: Spot gold fell below $4,590 per ounce
data.description: Spot gold fell below $4,590 per ounce, down 0.58% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gold prices continued their decline on Friday amid stronger-than-expected US economic data and easing geopolitical tensions.
data.description: Gold prices extended their losses on Friday, weighed down by stronger-than-expected US economic data and easing geopolitical tensions with Iran. Spot gold fell 0.5% to $4,590 an ounce. However, gold is still on track for a roughly 2% gain this week, having reached a record high of $4,642.72 an ounce on Wednesday. Julius Baer analyst Carsten Menke said, "The previous rally was strong, but it seems to have weakened... Recent US economic data has provided some headwind rather than support, which is reflected in the stronger dollar." Geopolitically, Iranian sources interviewed by foreign media on Wednesday and Thursday indicated that protests appeared to have subsided since Monday. Meanwhile, Indian gold demand remained weak this week due to prices hitting new record highs, with retail buying activity suppressed. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hassett downplayed the criminal investigation against Federal Reserve Chairman Powell.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett downplayed the federal criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell on Friday, saying he expected "nothing to go wrong." In an interview, Hassett stated that the Fed's investigation was merely a simple request for information, which would be provided soon, after which the investigation would continue. He also expressed hope for greater transparency regarding the overspending on the Fed headquarters renovations, a focus of the Justice Department's investigation. (Jinshi)

data.title: Two Prime to Manage $250 Million in Bitcoin for Digital Wealth Partners
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin financial services provider Two Prime has been selected by Digital Wealth Partners (DWP), a digital asset investment advisory firm, to manage approximately $250 million in Bitcoin for its clients. Two Prime plans to offer a low-volatility, Bitcoin-denominated return investment strategy through independently managed accounts. This approach aims to increase Digital Wealth Partners' Bitcoin holdings while safeguarding assets amid market fluctuations.

data.title: Binance Updates CreatorPad Point System and Launches Plasma Campaign
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, significant updates are being introduced to the CreatorPad point system, aimed at enhancing the quality of content on Binance Square. These changes are set to commence with the upcoming Plasma campaign. The primary focus will be on promoting quality over quantity, reducing the number of posts and trade requirements to encourage more meaningful and relevant content creation. This adjustment is designed to make it easier for users to earn points by producing valuable content.

The updated system will also introduce weighted rewards, which will prioritize genuine, high-quality interactions. This includes factoring in the volume of interactions such as comments, shares, likes, and total views. The rewards will remain merit-based and permissionless, ensuring that only true contributors are recognized. These changes will be reflected in the leaderboard, which is scheduled to launch on January 23, 2026.

In conjunction with these updates, Binance Square is launching a new campaign with Plasma (XPL) on CreatorPad. Verified users can participate by completing tasks to unlock a share of 3,500,000 XPL token voucher rewards. The activity period is set from January 16, 2026, at 13:00 (UTC) to February 12, 2026, at 09:00 (UTC). Participants can earn additional points by posting engaging and quality content, which will influence their ranking on the campaign leaderboard.

Eligible users will be ranked based on their performance over the last 30 days, with rewards distributed accordingly. The top 500 creators on both the global and Chinese leaderboards will share the reward pool. Users must complete account verification to receive rewards, and any suspicious activity may result in disqualification. Binance reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions of this activity at its discretion.

data.title: Cardano Foundation Launches Blockchain-Based Transparency Layer Reeve
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Cardano Foundation has introduced Reeve, a verifiable transparency layer aimed at addressing trust issues in traditional financial reporting through blockchain technology. This platform anchors financial events on the Cardano blockchain, providing auditors, regulators, and other stakeholders with tamper-proof and independently verifiable evidence. Reeve integrates with corporate financial systems, transforming post-event reviews into a continuous, data-driven control layer by embedding cryptographic verification at various reporting stages. The Cardano Foundation has already deployed Reeve within its financial operations, recording accounting transactions on-chain and directly integrating with ERP systems to create transparent and verifiable financial datasets.

data.title: Two Prime will manage $250 million worth of Bitcoin held by Digital Wealth Partners.
data.description: Bitcoin financial services provider Two Prime announced that Digital Wealth Partners (DWP), a digital asset investment advisory (RIA) firm, has selected Two Prime to manage approximately $250 million of Bitcoin for its clients. Two Prime aims to expand Digital Wealth Partners' Bitcoin holdings and protect assets during market volatility by offering a low-volatility Bitcoin-denominated return investment strategy through independently managed accounts. (Businesswire)

data.title: Hassett: If he accepts the position of Federal Reserve Chairman, he will commit to maintaining his independence.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that if he accepts the position of Federal Reserve Chairman, he will commit to improving transparency and pledge to uphold the Fed's independence. He added that the Fed's investigation was simply a request for information, which will be completed quickly, and then the process will continue. He anticipates no issues with the Fed's cost overruns and hopes for greater transparency. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hassett: Trump could immediately implement the 10% tariff after the Supreme Court makes an unfavorable ruling.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that following an unfavorable ruling by the U.S. Supreme Court, Trump could immediately implement the 10% tariff. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin as 'Element of Resistance': The Cryptocurrency Boom in Uprising Iran
data.description:
In Iran, amid inflation, protests and internet blackouts, Bitcoin is becoming a financial survival tool. A Chainalysis report reveals unprecedented crypto growth, between individual freedom and state use to circumvent sanctions.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/bitcoin-as-element-of-resistance-the-cryptocurrency-boom-in-uprising-iran/

data.title: Jefferies strategist: Bitcoin removed from portfolio due to concerns about quantum computing risks.
data.description: In his latest "Greed & Fear" market newsletter, Jefferies strategist Christopher Wood stated that he has completely removed Bitcoin from his flagship portfolio due to growing concerns that advances in quantum computing could jeopardize the long-term security of cryptocurrencies. His initial 10% Bitcoin allocation, first added at the end of 2020, has been replaced by a combined position in physical gold and gold mining stocks. Wood added that breakthroughs in quantum computing will weaken Bitcoin's role as a reliable store of value for pension investors. If the timeline for quantum technology is shortened, some capital allocators will now question Bitcoin's value-store properties. Furthermore, cryptographic attacks may occur sooner than expected, allowing attackers to derive private keys from exposed public keys, thereby undermining the cryptography that underpins Bitcoin balances and mining rewards and challenging its role as "digital gold" for pension portfolios. (Bloomberg)

data.title: PRIVA will launch a privacy policy, with revenue used for dividends and buybacks.
data.description: According to official sources, PRIVA will launch its privacy protocol tonight. Protocol fees will be used to distribute USDT/ETH dividends to nodes and to buy back and burn $PRV, implementing a "real return + deflationary" economic model.

data.title: Dogecoin Flirts With An Inverse Head And Shoulders: $0.15 Break Is The Trigger
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) is trying to base on higher timeframes as Cantonese Cat points to a potential inverse head-and-shoulders on the daily, with price compressing just beneath a defined resistance shelf while holding a nearby demand zone. Dogecoin Breakout Could Target $0. 19 In a daily chart (DOGE/USD, Binance) shared via X on Jan. 16, Cantonese Cat overlays an inverse head-and-shoulders schematic: a left shoulder in early December, a deeper “head” into late December near the mid-$0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin-flirts-with-an-inverse-hs-0-15-trigger/
